general_notes: GENERAL NOTES - DOORS 1. PROVIDE TEMPERED GLASS WHERE REQUIRED BY CODE.
GENERAL NOTES - DOORS 2. PROVIDE SILICONE SEALANT OVER BACKER ROD AT ALL EXTERIOR DOOR FRAMES.
GENERAL NOTES - DOORS 3. REFER TO SPECIFICATIONS FOR ADDITIONAL INFORMATION.
GENERAL NOTES - DOORS 4. FRAME WIDTH TO BE DETERMINED BY WALL THICKNESS.
GENERAL NOTES - DOORS 5. ALL HOLLOW METAL FRAMES TO BE WELDED FRAMES.
GENERAL NOTES - DOORS 6. SEE SHEETS A-020 FOR FINISH AND MATERIAL LEGEND.
GENERAL NOTES - WINDOWS 1. REFER TO FLOOR PLANS FOR LOCATION OF FRAME TYPES
GENERAL NOTES - WINDOWS 2. ALL DIMENSIONS GIVEN FOR WINDOWS ARE ROUGH OPENING DIMENSIONS (R.O.)

GENERAL NOTES - WINDOWS 3. ROUGH OPENING DIMENSION (R.O.) ARE MEANT TO GIVE GENERAL FRAME DIMENSIONS. ACTUAL WALL OPENING SHOULD BE COORDINATED BY THE CONTRACTOR BASED ON THE ACTUAL PRODUCTS SUBMITTED FOR CONSTRUCTION.
GENERAL NOTES - WINDOWS 4. PROVIDE SILICONE SEALANT OVER BACKER ROD AROUND ALL FRAMES AND LOUVERS.
GENERAL NOTES - WINDOWS 5. PROVIDE STAND OFF CLIPS AT ALL SPANDREL GLASS CONDITIONS.
GENERAL NOTES - WINDOWS 6. CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE TEMPERED GLAZING AT ALL LOCATIONS AS REQUIRED BY CODE.
GENERAL NOTES - WINDOWS 7. PROVIDE INSECT SCREEN FOR ALL LOUVERS.
GENERAL NOTES - STOREFRONTS 1. PROVIDE TEMPERED GLASS WHERE REQUIRED BY CODE.
GENERAL NOTES - STOREFRONTS 2. PROVIDE SILICONE SEALANT OVER BACKER ROD AT ALL EXTERIOR FRAMES.
GENERAL NOTES - STOREFRONTS 3. ALL FRAMES TO BE PRE-FINISHED ALUMINUM WITH SOLID PERIMETER FRAMING MEMBERS AND NO OPEN PROFILES.
GENERAL NOTES - STOREFRONTS 4. REFER TO SPECIFICATIONS FOR ADDITIONAL INFORMATION.
GENERAL NOTES - STOREFRONTS 5. REFER TO FLOOR PLANS FOR LOCATION OF FRAME TYPES.
- INGRESS VIA CARD READER OR MANUAL KEY OVERRIDE. FREE EGRESS AT ALL TIMES. FAIL-SECURE.
- DOOR CAN BE PROGRAMMED TO REMAIN UNLOCKED VIA ACCESS CONTROL SYSTEM.
1 NOTE BALANCE OF HARDWARE BY GATE SUPPLIER
** HARDWARE SET IS FOR GUIDELINE ONLY - COORDINATE WITH GATE SUPPLIER AND SECURITY CONTRACTOR PRIOR TO ALL SUBMITTALS.
- GC TO PREP AND ENSURE THE EGRESS LEVER IS NOT ACCESSIBLE FROM THE OUTSIDE.

estimator_notes: Keying notes captured from the drawings (3 line(s)); verify keyway, master structure, cylinder format and key counts.
18 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
11 hardware set(s) identified; 11 have a complete extracted item list.
23 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
11 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
